name: Zesty Cioppino
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds large shrimp, peeled and deveined
2 large Dungeness crab, cooked, cleaned, and cracked
1 1/2 pounds scallops or chunks of boneless snapper or cod
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a large pot.
2. Add onions, garlic, and parsley. Sauté until onions are soft.
3. Stir in the tomatoes with liquid, chicken broth, oregano, basil, bay leaf, salt, pepper, and wine.
4. Cover and allow to simmer for 25 to 30 minutes.
5. Add shrimp, crab, and scallops to the boiling stew.
6. Return stew to a boil, cover, and simmer for 5 to 7 minutes or until scallops are opaque.
7. Serve Cioppino hot from the pot into large soup bowls. Serves 8 to 10.
